fast_current.label: Fast current Wan2.2 / LightX2V / 2.7s
fast_current.notes: Existing production behavior. Fast but hallucinates people into empty presenter space (diagnosed 2026-07-01). Kept for compatibility/quick tests.

wan22_hq_720p_5s_no_lightx2v.label: HQ Wan2.2 / no LightX2V / 4s+ (recommended)
wan22_hq_720p_5s_no_lightx2v.obedience_wrapper: Subtle natural ambient motion only. Do not add any new people or subjects; keep empty areas empty. Preserve the source image composition, subject identity, and object layout. No new objects, no text, no logos, no morphing. Stable vertical 720x1280 composition.
wan22_hq_720p_5s_no_lightx2v.negative_prompt: 多余的人物, 路人, 行人, 人群, 有人走入画面, 第二个人, 字幕, 文字, 水印, 标志, 界面, extra person, additional people, another person walking into frame, passerby, bystander, crowd, second person, new human appearing, text, subtitles, captions, watermark, logo, signage, UI, interface, morphing, melting, extra limbs, extra fingers, deformed hands, distorted face, flicker, fast camera motion, scene change, low quality, jpeg artifacts
wan22_hq_720p_5s_no_lightx2v.notes: Proven fix on idx 002/021/025 (2026-07-01): removes hallucinated people, stays sharp. Uses clean motion prompt (NOT scene prompt), cfg4, 30 steps, no LightX2V. ~54min/clip on RTX 4090; 10 clips ~9h. Outputs to videos/mp4-hq-720p/ (does NOT overwrite videos/mp4/).
